utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: So what did he decide ? Does your Uncle Nathan get an invite or not ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Ohh , God , nobody likes him , and he is so cheap , he would never fly to London in a million years .

emotion_cause.span: 2_nobody likes him , and he is so cheap , he would never fly to London in a million years .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Hey , did I do these neat enough ?

utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: If anyone asks , we will just say Ben addressed them . Oh ! So you invited Rachel then ?

utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: I do not think I would be comfortable with any of my old lovers there .

emotion_cause.span: 11_I do not think I would be comfortable with any of my old lovers there .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Wait ... wait ... wait , do you , do you think , maybe we should not invite her ?

emotion_cause.span: 12_do you think , maybe we should not invite her ?

utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: Oh , no ... no , you know I absolutely adore Rachel it is just that , well it might be a awkward for you .

emotion_cause.span: 13_it might be a awkward for you .

utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: But it is absolutely your decision .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Huh ? Yeah , fine , invite whoever you want .
